name: Gassy Man
short_description: Use your gassy superpowers to fly and knock the UFO invaders out of the sky! Use the arrow keys to fly and float through the sky!
detailed_description:
Buzz

We want your feedback on Gassy Man! What do you like? What doi you love? What do you hate? Do you want to see Gassy Man developed into a full-length game? Updates and announcements will be posted here!


About the Game


The free-to-play version of Gassy Man, a game in development from All Day Breakfast Productions.
In Gassy Man our hero (Mike), must use his strangely noxious super power to defend the Earth from alien invaders!
Use the power of your own gas to fly across the city and knock UFOs out of the sky to save humanity from extraterrestrial invasion forces.
This game is in Beta and we would love to get player feedback to help make it better.

Simple gameplay mechanics utilize the directional arrows. Up to fly, left and right to move or float in that direction.
